## Summary

Describe the change.

## Scope check

- [ ] This change uses generic public information only.
- [ ] No company-private logs are included.
- [ ] No serial numbers, MAC addresses, IP addresses, hostnames, or customer data are included.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing behavior changed.

## Validation

Provide commands used to validate the change.

```bash
pytest
ruff check .
```
